subcodes.first_line: Months and years have passed while the Ancient Beauty remained in a manifest prison. We have embraced sorrows for the joy of all created things [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد مضت الشهور و السنین و کان جمال القدم فی سجن مبین قد قبلنا الاحزان لفرح الامکان
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @symbolism of color and light, @sacrifice of the Manifestation of God redeems the world
